onboarding.step1Subtitle: Zaɓi sunan mai amfani, zabi hotona, ka faɗa mana inda ka fito.
onboarding.step2Subtitle: Amsa tambayoyi 4 cikin sauri don mu iya dacewa da ɗakuna masu dacewa.
onboarding.q1: Yaya kake son ciyar da yammacinku?
onboarding.q2: Ƙarshen makon ku na arziki shine…
onboarding.q3: Zaɓi kalma da ke bayyana ka:

guild.title: Ƙungiya
guild.findYourCrewDesc: Ƙungiyoyi su ne ƙungiyoyin 'yan wasa da ke fafatawa a yaƙe-yaƙe, raba taska, kuma su tashi tare a allon jagoranci. Shiga ɗaya ko gina naka.

roomDetail.vipRoomBody: Yi rajista don karanta da aika saƙonni a wannan ɗakin.

roomDetail.highlightMemberSoon: Shigar da sunan mai amfani don nuna.
